name: Token Monitor
description: Monitors LLM token usage per-agent, per-source, and overall, with a cost-aware analytics dashboard.
author: Evonic

variables.name: PRICING_JSON
variables.label: Model Pricing (JSON)
variables.description: Optional override of per-model prices in USD per 1M tokens. Object keyed by a model-name substring, each value {"in": <input price>, "out": <output price>}. Example: {"claude-opus": {"in": 15, "out": 75}}. Leave empty to use built-in defaults.
